---
title: "Bayesian Stochastic Volatility Forecasting"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)
```

# Forecasting

```{r}
source("01_Data_Wrangling.R")
source("03_Garch_Models.R")
source("04_Bayesian_Model.R")
source("08_Forecasting.R")
```

### Data

```{r}
raw_data <- LogReturn("AAPL")
log_return <- raw_data$log_return
```

```{r}
test_size <- 50
window_size <- 500
```

```{r, results='hide', message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, cache = TRUE}
roll_results <- Run_Rolling_Forecast_Comparison(
  log_return = log_return,
  test_size = test_size,
  window_size = window_size
)
```

```{r}
roll_results$error_metrics$sv_mse
roll_results$error_metrics$garch_mse

roll_results$error_metrics$sv_mae
roll_results$error_metrics$garch_mae
```

```{r}
Rolling_Forecast_Comparison_Plot(
  test_returns = roll_results$test_returns,
  sv_roll = roll_results$sv_roll,
  garch_roll = roll_results$garch_roll
)

```
